workstreams.name: Frontend Rebuild
workstreams.notes: Component library 90% complete. Accessibility audit scheduled for next week.

workstreams.name: API Migration
workstreams.notes: Authentication service refactor is 2 weeks behind due to scope expansion from security review.

workstreams.name: Design System
workstreams.notes: Final review with brand team on Thursday. On track to ship v1.0 next sprint.

workstreams.name: User Testing
workstreams.notes: Cannot recruit test participants without approved incentive budget. Awaiting finance approval since 2026-03-20.

workstreams.name: Data Migration
workstreams.notes: Schema mapping complete. Production dry-run scheduled for 2026-04-15.

risks.description: Auth service refactor delay will cascade into integration testing window
risks.mitigation: Parallelize by having two engineers own auth refactor; pull forward integration test fixtures so they're ready the moment auth lands.

risks.description: User testing blocker may invalidate launch-readiness criteria
risks.mitigation: Escalate incentive budget to VP Finance this week; in parallel, use internal dogfood testing as a fallback signal.

risks.description: Design system brand review may require color palette changes
risks.mitigation: Pre-reviewed swatches with brand lead on 2026-04-01; low probability of surprise but holding a 2-day buffer in the sprint.

risks.description: Data migration dry-run may surface unexpected production data volume issues
risks.mitigation: Sampled production data into staging environment last week; no anomalies detected yet.

asks.need: Approve $12K user testing incentive budget to unblock the User Testing workstream
Confirm whether the expanded auth scope is a hard requirement for launch or can be deferred to post-launch hardening
Decision on whether to hold launch date or slip by one week to absorb auth delay without compressing integration testing
